overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking along a rooftop promenade in Night City. The player passes by a large Colosal Machistador billboard, navigates around the rooftop overlooking the futuristic cityscape with the iconic Arasaka tower, and observes the highway interchange below.

events.description: pedestrian walks past camera briefly blocking the view of the billboard
enters narrow shaded passage between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the rooftop promenade past the large billboard, briefly entering a shaded narrow passage

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera from right to left in front of the billboard

entered.detail: large teal billboard with cartoonish food creature advertising Colosal Machistador snack
low-rise building with orange roof and white facade
concrete bench on the rooftop walkway
modern overhead light fixture on the rooftop

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a sunny rooftop promenade dominated by a large teal billboard advertising Colosal Machistador. The player walks forward as a pedestrian passes by, then enters a brief narrow shaded passage between buildings before emerging back to the open rooftop area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rooftop plaza with corporate tower view

events.description: exits narrow passage into open plaza revealing the Arasaka tower
slows down to look around at the cityscape and tower

agents.ego_description: walking along the open rooftop plaza, approaching the railing to view the Arasaka tower and surrounding futuristic cityscape

notable_agents.action: standing near the railing looking out at the city view

entered.detail: tall cylindrical corporate tower with vertical ARASAKA signage
building with large satellite dishes on the roof
elevated highway structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the scene opens into a wide rooftop plaza with a commanding view of the Arasaka tower dominating the skyline. The player walks along the edge, passing an NPC observing the view, while the distant highway and satellite dish building become visible against the clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop walkway along building edge overlooking highway

events.description: turns right to follow the walkway along the building edge
view opens up to reveal the highway interchange below the rooftop

agents.ego_description: walking along the rooftop edge, turning corners and observing the highway traffic below

entered.detail: row of red vending machines lined against the wall
concrete ramp leading down to lower level
overhanging structure from adjacent building creating partial shade

segments.scene_description: The player continues along the rooftop walkway, turning right along the building edge where an overhang provides partial shade. Red vending machines and a stairway ramp appear as the view opens up to show the busy highway interchange below, with the Arasaka tower now behind and to the left.

events.description: stops briefly to look down at the highway traffic below

agents.ego_description: standing near the railing overlooking the multi-level highway interchange with moving traffic below

entered.detail: palm trees lining the edge of the rooftop overlooking the highway
tall modern street lamps with horizontal light bars
multi-level highway interchange with visible moving traffic

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a panoramic view of the highway interchange from the rooftop edge. The player stops to observe the traffic below, with palm trees and modern light poles framing the view. The satellite dish building now appears on the right as the camera faces the expansive city highway system.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey across a sunny rooftop promenade that transitions from a confined urban walkway into an expansive panoramic vista of the city's infrastructure. It begins under the glow of a large teal Colosal Machistador billboard, moving past a pedestrian and through a brief, narrow shaded passage. As the camera emerges from the shade, the scene opens into a wide plaza where the towering Arasaka tower dominates the skyline against a clear blue sky. The movement then continues along the building's edge, passing red vending machines and a stairway ramp as the perspective shifts to reveal a busy highway interchange below. Finally, the camera comes to a halt at the rooftop's edge, framing a wide view of the traffic, palm trees, and a distant satellite dish building.
